sections.name: Workforce
sections.description: Questions about your organization's workforce composition and structure

questions.questionText: Headcount size (all employees)
Where are employees most likely to receive benefits updates?
Are many employees deskless (performing job duties outside of an office setting)?
What is the most common commute method among your employees?
How long are employees commuting to the office (estimated average time)
Do independent contractors and/or seasonal employees make up a large portion (greater than 30%) of your workforce?
What are the most common job titles or functions that make up most of your workforce and percentage of those roles?
Estimated % of hourly employees

validationRules.errorMessage: Please enter 30% for hourly employees. Hourly and salary percentages must sum to 100%

questions.questionText: Estimated % of salary employees

validationRules.errorMessage: Please enter 70% for salary employees. Hourly and salary percentages must sum to 100%.

questions.questionText: List the top 5 work locations that employees are commuting to
Do the majority of employees reside in the same zip codes above?

question.questionText: If no, where do your employees live? Select top 5 common zip code areas

fields.label: Zip Code
fields.errorMessage: Zip code must be exactly 5 digits

validationRules.errorMessage: Please enter a percentage between 0 and 100

validationRules.errorMessage: Please enter a percentage between 0 and 100

sections.name: Compensation
sections.description: Select salary that apply best to your workforce. This doesn't have to be exact.

questions.questionText: Which range best describes your employees' median annual earnings?
Which range best describes your HOURLY employees' earnings rate?
Which range best describes your SALARIED employees' median annual earnings?
Do you offer annual raises?
Who is your company payroll provider?

question.questionText: Please enter your payroll provider if not listed

questions.questionText: Are your hourly employees eligible for shift differentials e.g. extra pay for nights/weekends/holidays?
Are most of your employees eligible for short-term incentives such as spot, quarterly or annual bonuses, commissions, profit sharing?
Are most of your employees eligible for long-term incentives such as stock plans, pension plan, deferred compensation?

sections.name: Benefits
sections.description: Questions about employee benefits including supplemental benefits, retirement, and health insurance

sections.name: Goals
sections.description: Questions about company workforce benefit goals and priorities

questions.questionText: Please select your workforce benefit goals (top 3)

options.label: Support employees navigating company benefits and community resources
Reduce quick quits (turnover in under 90 days)
Support employees navigating company benefits and community resources

questions.questionText: Rank your company's top three workforce goals (from above list)

validationRules.customValidation: Must contain exactly 3 goals selected from workforceGoals
